quotes.verbatim_quote: Practice Pattern No. 108 by reversing the direction of the chord tones: descending, ascending, etc.
quotes.why_load_bearing: This instruction defines the core practice method for the chapter — reversing directional arpeggio patterns — which is the characteristic pedagogical move applied to every exercise in Chapter 14.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Note: Each chord lasts rwo beats.
quotes.why_load_bearing: This is an explicit rhythmic rule governing how long each chord is held during the exercises, setting the metrical framework for all patterns in the chapter.
